channel.title: Pattaya Gym Directory - Equestrian venues
channel.description: Latest equestrian venues in the Pattaya Gym Directory.

item.title: Horseshoe Point Resort & Country Club
item.description: 1,500-acre equestrian + adventure mega-facility. International Riding School (est 1999). 5 indoor/outdoor arenas, 100+ horses (Lusitano, Appaloosa, Lipizzaner, Arabs, Warmbloods, Falabella, Thai pony). Polo. Paintball. Zipline. Mountain biking. Multi-sport field. Accommodation.

item.title: Thai Polo & Equestrian Club
item.description: Largest multi-functional polo + equestrian in all Asia. 250 hectares. 3 polo fields + 2 practice. 250+ stables. Endurance + Derby. Argentinian vet GM.
